status_caveat: Code deployed verified via main JS bundle inspection (markers v2-app-gateway + /u-earnings present). Playwright auth-bypass smoke 0/5 due to ENTA onboarding gate intercepting test users before /app renders (fixture limitation, NOT code issue). Manual verification recommended via real user account.
approach: Add optional routeOverride prop to PlusHubShellV3. /app renders V3 springboard with V2 route map override. /v3/plus unchanged (no routeOverride passed = V3 routes from APP_CATALOG).

smoke_test_5_cases.method: Playwright via auth-bypass.fixture.js with Explorer tier
smoke_test_5_cases.failure_root_cause: gateByJourney('app', ...) intercepts test users (Explorer tier from auditmol5eus0@deltajohnsons.com email) and redirects to ENTA onboarding form instead of rendering AppGatewayRoute. This is a fixture limitation (test users not ENTA-completed), NOT a code issue.
smoke_test_5_cases.evidence: test-results error-context.md page snapshot shows 'Hoàn tất ENTA' heading + form fields, not PLUS Hub springboard.
smoke_test_5_cases.alternative_verification: Main JS bundle on production https://uzg.plus/assets/index-BCP1Yu3K.js contains markers: v2-app-gateway (1x), /u-earnings (2x). Code IS deployed.
smoke_test_5_cases.manual_verification_recommended: NTS or any user with completed ENTA can browse https://uzg.plus/app to see V3 springboard with V2 routes wired.

next_phase: Bước 3 — TAO mini app fix full-screen takeover pattern (LANE02-V2LIVE-TAO-MINIAPP-CHUAN-V1)
